summary: VERIFIED (linearized core): (d_t + d_s)^2 gamma_AB^TF = 4(psi0 mbar_A mbar_B + cc) with psi0 = (1/4)(d_t + d_s)^2 h_mm = -C(l,m,l,m), OFF-SHELL, on the paper-1 frame; l.d annihilates outgoing waves so the BC is transparent to them; CCE psi0' (N2 boost) supplies the physical datum of P1 eq:BCs_lastII; L=0 Bjorhus form fixed for implementation

summary: VERIFIED: Z4c state <-> ADM <-> 4-metric maps exact (round trip, ADM inverse identity, full symbols); kinematic closure d_t gamma = -2 alpha K + Lie_beta gamma holds IFF the chi-equation divergence is the full covariant D_i beta^i = d_k beta^k - (3/2) beta^k d_k ln chi (naive partial-divergence reading leaves residual gamma_ij beta^k d_k ln chi, c=1) — convention resolved, not assumed; implemented as packages/zccm z4c_vars (JAX float64, 4-GPU tested)

summary: VERIFIED: CCM physical injection (TT channel) is orthogonal to the Z4c constraint sector at linearized order — H and M_i vanish identically off-shell for arbitrary TT data, so incoming constraint characteristics U-_Theta, U-_Z stay 0 under any CCM datum; paper-1 order-L CPBCs retained VERBATIM. Refined boundary-channel taxonomy: TT = physical (CCM), h_xx = gauge (constraint-free), h_xA = constraint-vector (sources M_A), tangential trace = constraint-scalar (sources H). Negative controls verified

summary: VERIFIED: (A) CCM/TT channel sources neither the trace (K==0), nor Gammat^i, off-shell — gauge sector decouples from the injection, so paper-1 gauge BCs are admissible; (B) on P1's own boundary model (eq:eomgammasA) naive Sommerfeld reflects R = -b(1-b)/((1+b)(2-b)) != 0 while P1's boundary-adapted outgoing operator gives R = 0 identically at normal incidence — P3's gauge-reflection bottleneck removed at model level
